brand.tagline: MVP rolling out · Early access open
brand.hero_title: Run your consultancy from timesheet to invoice
brand.hero_subtitle: Kore unifies timesheets, TMA and UO budgets in one SaaS suite. We're opening the first deployments — co-build the PSA your consultancy or IT department needs.

pillars.title: Three margin levers, one suite
pillars.tma_desc: Requests, releases and fixed/T&M tracking — no more surprises at month end.
pillars.timesheet_desc: Weekly/monthly entry, manager validation and client PDF in one click.
pillars.budget_desc: Triple consumption, proactive alerts and real-time SSII steering.

compliance.title: European compliance
compliance.desc: EN 16931 e-invoicing via PDP, immutable ETT and delegated probative archiving.

book.subtitle: Talk to our team about your PSA/ESN needs — no commitment, full transparency on MVP status.

book.aside_2: Guided onboarding on your first module
book.aside_3: Full transparency on what's already live

users.subtitle: Accounts and profiles in your organization

landing.cta_title: Move from manual steering to industrial-grade PSA
landing.cta_text: 30 minutes is enough to see if Kore fits your context. Or pick your modules and start today.
landing.problem_title: Every week lost in spreadsheets is margin gone
landing.problem_subtitle: Without a unified suite, teams re-enter data, managers validate late and billing slips.
landing.problem_1_desc: Double entry, makeshift client PDFs, late validations — and billable days left on the table.
landing.problem_2_title: TMA and UO budgets in a grey zone
landing.problem_2_desc: Blurry fixed vs T&M, late alerts, decisions made without reliable consumption visibility.
landing.problem_3_desc: EN 16931 e-invoicing, probative archiving: better to integrate now than scramble later.
landing.value_subtitle: Concrete benefits from your first activated module — not a vague promise.
landing.value_1_desc: Automated timesheets, validations and client PDF exports. Enter once, data flows everywhere.
landing.value_2_desc: Real-time UO and TMA tracking with alerts before overrun. You steer, you don't react.
landing.value_3_desc: EN 16931 e-invoicing and probative archiving built into the MVP — not an 18-month IT project.
landing.workflow_title: From entry to invoice, without friction
landing.workflow_subtitle: A continuous flow your teams grasp in 5 minutes.
landing.workflow_step_1_desc: Weekly/monthly timesheets, manager workflow, full history and client-ready PDF.
landing.workflow_step_2_desc: TMA, releases, UO consumption and budget alerts — all in one place.
landing.workflow_step_3_desc: Modular subscription, EN 16931 e-invoicing and delegated probative archiving.
landing.audiences_title: Consultancy or IT department: Kore fits your reality
landing.audience_esn_desc: Multi-client steering, timesheets, TMA, UO budgets and modular billing — a suite that scales with your teams.
landing.audience_dsi_desc: Consumption visibility, built-in compliance and progressive rollout by scope or entity.
landing.modules_subtitle: 6+ MVP modules available — add more as you grow.
landing.pricing_teaser_title: Pay for what you use, not an oversized ERP
landing.pricing_teaser_subtitle: Monthly subscription per module and per seat. No blocking annual licence.
landing.pricing_guarantee: Monthly billing · Easy cancellation · MVP onboarding
landing.faq_title: We answer your objections before the call
landing.faq_1_q: Do we need to migrate everything at once?
landing.faq_1_a: No. Kore is modular: deploy timesheets first, add TMA or UO budget when ready. Zero big bang.
landing.faq_2_a: The MVP is live. After a scoping call, allow a few days to configure your tenant and train key users.
landing.faq_3_a: Monthly subscription per module and per seat. Enable only what you need — pricing is public, no opaque quotes.
landing.faq_4_a: Kore prepares EN 16931 e-invoicing via PDP, with immutable ETT and delegated probative archiving. Built in, not an add-on.
landing.faq_5_q: Why no client logos or testimonials?
landing.faq_5_a: Kore is still being rolled out. We'd rather be transparent than invent social proof. Book a demo to see the real product.
landing.readiness_title: What's already live in the MVP
landing.readiness_subtitle: No marketing fluff: here's what Kore covers today, and what's coming next.
landing.readiness_1_desc: Entry, manager validation and branded client PDF generation.
landing.readiness_2_desc: Company setup, tenant logo and admin workspace.
landing.readiness_3_desc: Online demo booking and modular per-seat pricing grid.
landing.readiness_4_desc: Catalog modules being integrated into the MVP.
landing.readiness_5_desc: E-invoicing and probative archiving built into the product design.
landing.early_subtitle: No client references yet — but founding access to co-build your PSA.
landing.early_1_desc: Your field feedback prioritizes the next modules and workflows.
landing.early_2_desc: Tenant setup, key user training and module-by-module rollout.
landing.early_3_desc: Start with timesheets or org, add TMA and budget when you're ready.
landing.mid_cta_text: A 30-minute demo is enough to validate fit for your consultancy or IT department context.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Monthly subscription per module and per seat — enable only what you need
